title: hieracium thapsiformoides subsp. thapsiformoides
intro: Hieracium thapsiformoides subsp. thapsiformoides, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Hieracium thapsiformoides subsp. thapsiformoides include its use in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture, and has been used in herbal medicine for centuries.
